title: Epic Cheese
body:
Epic Cheese is a mod that _for now_ adds cheese, bread with cheese, cheese ore and a cheese biome.

This mod is in beta and I have things planned c:

- The cheese can be crafted with a bucket of milk and honey.

- The bread with cheese with a bread and cheese.

- The cheese block with 4 of cheese.

- Cheese ore generates below Y=55.

- Cheese Plains generates in the overworld.

Requires Fabric API and 1.17+
